title: AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Project Assistant Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) has officially released the notification for 2026. Allotted various vacancies for Senior Project Assistant Jobs. Candidates who have qualified in the 12th or any degree can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Delhi Notification 2026 . Here we provided more details about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts.
